introSection: Thriller was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Euclid Beach Park in Cleveland, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Thrilled was designed by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters in October 1923 and erected during the 1923-1924 off-season. Thriller opened in 1924. The ride originally featured a tall second hill, but the height of that hill was later decreased to nearly a third of that. Alterations were also made on the series of small hills at the end of the ride.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride originally operated with. By the early 1960s, only a maximum of two trains operated due to overhead and safety concerns.

fullText:
Thriller was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Euclid Beach Park in Cleveland, Ohio, USA.

Thrilled was designed by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters in October 1923 and erected during the 1923-1924 off-season. Thriller opened in 1924. The ride originally featured a tall second hill, but the height of that hill was later decreased to nearly a third of that. Alterations were also made on the series of small hills at the end of the ride.



The ride originally operated with. By the early 1960s, only a maximum of two trains operated due to overhead and safety concerns.
